title: DNA Cleanup Using SPRIselect Beads
author: Opentrons
materials: Beads are left to incubate for 5 minutes
Supernatant is removed and disposed of
Samples are left to elute for 2 minutes

steps.title: This is the second of four...
steps.instruction: This is the second of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup. This is the first of two cleanups.

steps.title: SPRI beads are mixed prior to...
steps.instruction: SPRI beads are mixed prior to 126 uL being added to samples

steps.title: Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate beads
steps.instruction: Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate beads

steps.title: Beads are washed twice with 200...
steps.instruction: Beads are washed twice with 200 uL of ethanol, disposing of ethanol each time

steps.title: 101 uL of elution solution is...
steps.instruction: 101 uL of elution solution is added to the samples and mixed

steps.title: Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate beads
steps.instruction: Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate beads

steps.title: 100 uL of now eluted sample...
steps.instruction: 100 uL of now eluted sample is transferred to column 2 on the 96 well plate
